underlying_goal: Execute a scripted startup routine: check hooked work and mail in a custom 'Gas Town' project management system, then act on any hooked work
friction_detail: The gt/bd tooling had version mismatches, missing Dolt server, and uninitialized database requiring extensive debugging before the basic commands could run.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to check hooked work and mail in their Gas Town system; Claude debugged infrastructure issues (Dolt server, schema initialization) and reported no hooked work or mail.
